GenAiPlugin.description: Use this topic to distribute site evaluation results via WhatsApp for quick and accessible decision-making.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: If the query involves sharing site evaluation results via WhatsApp, use the 'Slack__SendMessageToSlackChannel' action.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to only distribute site evaluation results to users via WhatsApp. You aren't able to create or analyze the evaluation results.
